headline: Does Monolithic Power Systems' (MPWR) Higher Dividend Reveal Its True AI Expansion Strategy?
summary: On June 12, 2026, Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. declared a second-quarter cash dividend of US$2.00 per share, payable on July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026. The dividend announcement comes amid strong recent earnings and growing demand for Monolithic Power Systems’ power solutions in AI data centers and infrastructure. With this fresh dividend declaration underscoring cash generation, we’ll now examine how it interacts with Monolithic Power Systems’ AI-driven...
